title: K-200 Propulsion Environmental Test Report
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Environmental Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-487-A. Revision: A. Type: risk-register. Author: Marcus Thaine. Created: 2023-11-29. Last modified: 2024-01-08. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1067, P-1027, P-1019.
